prompt: Create a dramatic vertical anime-style illustration of a tall, muscular anthropomorphic wolf security agent standing in a dark industrial stairwell. The character is a blue-and-white wolf with pale blue fur, white chest and muzzle markings, sharp wolf ears, a large fluffy tail with a white tip, athletic bodybuilder proportions, defined abs and legs, and a confident guarded stance. He wears a black baseball cap, rectangular glasses, a blue medical face mask, black fingerless tactical gloves, a black diagonal shoulder strap, a black utility belt, black thigh straps, a right-thigh holster pouch, minimal tight blue athletic briefs, and red-and-black chunky sneakers. His right hand holds a black pistol upright beside his shoulder while his left fist hangs at his side. Use pale blue and white, blue, red and black, black pistol, and dark concrete industrial stairwell. Compose from a low camera angle looking upward to emphasize heroic scale and long legs, with the character leaning slightly near a tall concrete pillar. The background shows metal stairs, railings, overhead pipes, concrete walls, and a cool skylight glow, with moody high-contrast lighting, crisp cel-shaded rendering, detailed fur texture, sharp linework, realistic shadows, cinematic depth, and a serious urban tactical atmosphere.
